title: Italy Request for a Passport for Adults (Modello 308)
description: Modello 308, 'Modulo per la richiesta di passaporto per maggiorenni' (Form for the request of a passport for adults), published by the Polizia di Stato (Ministero dell'Interno) and submitted to the Questura (provincial police headquarters) of the applicant's residence/domicile in Italy, or to the competent Diplomatic/Consular Representation abroad — booking is made online via passaportonline.poliziadistato.it. This is a genuine fillable AcroForm (57 Widget annotations confirmed via pdfjs-dist across a 3-page, 1,749,585-byte PDF), not the text-less scanned form the registry's prior GOV-2382/GOV-2404/GOV-2716 scouting passes assumed when a live-fetch WAF block against questure.poliziadistato.it prevented direct inspection — see VERIFICATION.md for the full correction and the Wayback Machine retrieval that made independent re-verification possible. This document models the applicant-facing core of page 1 of 3: personal identity/birth/residence data, the identity document being used to prove identity, contact details, physical-description fields (eye colour code, height, sex) required for the passport's own data, an already-held-passport declaration, a domicile-if-different-from-residence block, the minor-children/parental-responsibility declaration together with up to three other-parent identity blocks (the form's own 'Altro genitore: 1) 2) 3)' rows — three OTHER PARENTS holding parental responsibility, not three children, correcting a mischaracterization in this issue's own pre-scouting note), the four request-type checkboxes ('Chiede: (8)'), a pickup-delegate block, and the document/payment requirements printed on page 3 of 3's instructions. It deliberately does NOT model: the 'Alla Questura di'/'Protocollo' header boxes and the entire 'Riservato all'ufficio' attestation strip at the foot of page 1 (explicitly reserved, per the form's own footnote 11, 'al Pubblico Ufficiale competente a ricevere la documentazione' — the receiving official, not the applicant); page 2 of 3's 'Riservato all'Ufficio' checklist, 'esito accertamenti', VISTO/decision block, Poste Italiane insured-mail code, and office stamp/signature lines (all explicitly office-completed, following this registry's dk/cpr and se/skatteverket office-reserved-content precedent); and both pages' wet-ink signature lines. Two fields with no corresponding AcroForm widget are nonetheless modelled as disclosed judgment calls, matching this registry's it/mit precedent for un-widgeted but clearly applicant-facing boxes: requestingQuestura (the 'Alla Questura di' header box) and dataProtectionConsent (page 2's GDPR Article 13 consent declaration, which page 2 carries as flat image content with zero AcroForm widgets of its own). GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Italy, the Ministero dell'Interno, or the Polizia di Stato.

operatedBy.name: Ministero dell'Interno
operatedBy.basis: Legge 21 novembre 1967, n. 1185 (Norme sui passaporti), articoli 3 e 3-bis, e art. 46 lettera aa) del D.P.R. 28 dicembre 2000, n. 445; the form itself (Modello 308) is published and distributed by the Polizia di Stato's own Questure (provincial police headquarters), the passport-issuing authority under Italian law.

source.documentRef: Modello 308, 'Modulo per la richiesta di passaporto per maggiorenni'

verification.notes: GOV-3031, a pre-scouted GOV-3026 child issue authoring Italy's Passport-vertical opener (Italy previously 2/6 — DMV and Taxes only — now 3/6). This overturns this registry's own GOV-2382/GOV-2404/GOV-2716 'confirmed dead end' finding for IT Passport, which rested solely on a live-fetch 'Accesso negato' WAF block against questure.poliziadistato.it and never actually inspected the document. Independently re-fetched this cycle via direct curl against the Wayback Machine (the live URL remains WAF-blocked): first queried the CDX API (`web.archive.org/cdx/search/cdx?url=questure.poliziadistato.it/statics/33/modulo-passaporti-maggiorenni.pdf&output=json`), which returned exactly one capture at timestamp 20250807022716; fetched `https://web.archive.org/web/20250807022716/https://questure.poliziadistato.it/statics/33/modulo-passaporti-maggiorenni.pdf` directly (not the approximate '20250807000000*' form in the issue, which is a CDX wildcard query, not a fetchable snapshot URL). Result: HTTP 200, `content-type: application/pdf`, memento-datetime Thu, 07 Aug 2025 02:27:16 GMT, exactly 1,749,585 bytes, sha256 `67ef4f41dd8ee5681aab1c1389a11f8608a52c208ddd93f0f3011ef1a7eee384` — byte-for-byte confirming the prior scouting note's own citation. **Major correction to the prior note**: `pdfjs-dist` 4.10.38 (`legacy/build/pdf.mjs`) `page.getAnnotations()` found this is a genuine fillable AcroForm, not a zero-widget static PDF as the pre-scouting note assumed — page 1 of 3 carries exactly 57 `/Widget` annotations (44 `Tx` text fields, 13 `Btn` independent checkboxes), page 2 of 3 carries 0 widgets (a flat scanned/rendered image plus a Link annotation), page 3 of 3 carries 0 widgets and one `Link` annotation only (to `https://passaportonline.poliziadistato.it/`). `doc.numPages` is 3, not the 'roughly 2-3 pages' the note guessed. Both `getTextContent()` and an operator-list dump (`getOperatorList()`) showed pages 1-2 have **zero extractable text items** — each page is a single full-page `paintImageXObject` call (2480x3508px JPEG) with the 57 widgets overlaid on top at precise coordinates for data entry; only page 3 (the numbered footnote instructions) carries genuine vector text (325 items). The PDF uses Standard-security-handler V4/AESV2 128-bit encryption with an empty user password (permissions-only, e.g. print restrictions) — `pdfjs-dist` decrypts transparently for `getAnnotations`/`getTextContent`/`getOperatorList`, but the sandbox's `node-canvas`-based `page.render()` reproduced this registry's known GOV-2316/GOV-2389 image-XObject rendering failure ('Image or Canvas expected') for pages 1-2 (page 3 rendered fine). Direct object-stream extraction (as used for GOV-2389's TT2119) was not viable here because the two image objects (474, 476; `/Filter/DCTDecode`) are AES-encrypted at the stream level, and manual PDF decryption was not attempted. Instead, the npm `mupdf` package (`mupdf@1.28.0`, a WASM build of MuPDF with its own decryption/rendering pipeline, independent of `pdfjs-dist`/`node-canvas`) rendered all 3 pages to PNG at 3x scale with no rendering-pipeline failures; page 1 was then read directly, and every one of the 57 widget rects was cross-checked against the rendered image by drawing each widget's rect (converted from PDF user-space, bottom-left origin, to the image's top-left-origin pixel space at the same 3x scale) as a labelled overlay box, confirming every field-name-to-visible-label mapping used in this schema by direct visual co-location (script and annotated PNG discarded after use, not committed). Field count: **57 real AcroForm fields**, not the pre-scouting note's 'roughly 30-35' estimate — the note's estimate undercounted mainly because the up-to-3-repeating block (see below) alone contributes 12 fields, and several single-purpose boxes (birth/residence province-vs-foreign-country code pairs, 'N.civico' house-number boxes) are their own separate widgets rather than being folded into a neighbouring field. **Correcting the issue's own pre-scouting description**: the form's 'Altro genitore: 1) 2) 3)' block (Cognome e nome / Data di nascita / Comune di nascita / Sigla prov., x3) records up to **three OTHER PARENTS** holding parental responsibility for the applicant's minor children (relevant when 'Unico esercente responsabilità genitoriale' = NO) — it is NOT, as the issue's pre-scouting note stated, 'up to 3 children with each parent's data'; the form records only a yes/no fact about whether the applicant has minor children ('Figli minori? (7)'), never the children's own identities. Modelled here as a bounded 1-3 repeating group (`otherParent1`.. `otherParent3`), matching this registry's established `child1`..`childN` bounded-repeating-group convention (e.g. `ng/nis`'s passport schema). All 13 checkboxes are genuinely independent `Btn` widgets with `exportValue: 'Yes'` and no shared radio-group parent (confirmed via `radioButton: false` on every one) — per this registry's `si/ajpes` precedent (GOV-2910), each is modelled as its own independent `boolean` field, with `exclusivityGroups` recording the six pick-one-of-two/four choices the source visually presents as SI/NO or single-select checkbox rows (sex, obstructive-conditions declaration, minor-children declaration, sole-parental-responsibility declaration, spouse-surname-printing declaration, and the four-way request-type row), not modelled as `enum` fields. Two fields with no AcroForm widget of their own are included as disclosed judgment calls: `requestingQuestura` (the 'Alla Questura di' header box, part of the flat page-1 image, but unambiguously an applicant-supplied value) and `dataProtectionConsent` (page 2's GDPR Article 13 consent declaration, also flat image content). All quoted footnote text (footnotes 1-11 plus 'INDICAZIONI GENERALI' and the lettered a-e document list) was transcribed verbatim from page 3's genuine text layer via `getTextContent()` with y-coordinate row-clustering (items grouped within a 3pt y-tolerance band, matching the row-reconstruction technique this registry's `gr/yme` cycle (GOV-3026) established for out-of-visual-order text streams) — page 3's own item order already matched visual reading order once row-clustered, so no further x/y re-sequencing beyond the row grouping was needed. A second independent mirror (studio74.it) was not additionally re-fetched this cycle since the Wayback capture's sha256 already matches the issue's own independently-stated hash byte-for-byte, and `verify-sources.mjs` re-confirms the cited Wayback URL live at PR time. `documents[]` (5 entries: identity-document copy, 2 ICAO photographs, the €42.50 postal payment, the €73.50 administrative-contribution stamp, and the optional prior/lost passport evidence) is transcribed from page 3's own lettered list ('DA PRODURRE ALL'ATTO DELLA PRESENTAZIONE DELL'ISTANZA: a)-e)'). Two mock conformance scenarios (a first-time applicant with no minor children, and an applicant with minor children/another parent holding shared responsibility plus a pickup delegate) found 0 errors each against a from-scratch, ephemeral field-by-field conformance checker (deriving required/requiredWhen/enum/pattern/exclusivityGroups rules directly from this schema's own fields[]/documents[], discarded after use, not committed), plus 6 mutation-control fixtures (missing required field, missing required document, enum violation, pattern violation, exclusivityGroups violation, requiredWhen violation) each correctly raised exactly 1 error.

fields.name: requestingQuestura
fields.label: Alla Questura di
fields.description: The Questura (provincial police headquarters) the request is addressed to — the office where the applicant has residence, domicile, or dimora (per footnote 1), or the Diplomatic/Consular Representation if abroad. Printed as a header box on the flat page-1 background image with no AcroForm widget of its own (disclosed judgment call — see VERIFICATION.md); still modelled here since it is unambiguously an applicant-supplied value, not office-reserved content.
fields.sourceRef: Modello 308 p.1/3, header box 'Alla Questura di'

fields.name: surname
fields.label: Cognome
fields.description: The applicant's surname, part of the declaration made under criminal liability (art. 76 D.P.R. 445/2000) for false statements.

fields.name: firstName
fields.label: Nome
fields.description: The applicant's first name(s).

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Data di nascita
fields.description: The applicant's date of birth.

fields.name: birthMunicipality
fields.label: Comune di nascita
fields.description: The applicant's municipality of birth (or foreign city, if born abroad).

fields.name: birthProvinceCode
fields.label: Sigla prov.
fields.description: Two-letter Italian province code of the municipality of birth (e.g. RM for Roma). Left blank if born abroad, in which case birthForeignStateCode is used instead — the source prints the two boxes side by side as an Italy-vs-abroad pair, not cross-validated here as mutually exclusive.

fields.name: birthForeignStateCode
fields.label: Sigla stato
fields.description: Foreign-country code for the applicant's place of birth, used only when born outside Italy (three-character box, comb-formatted).

fields.name: residenceMunicipality
fields.label: Comune di residenza
fields.description: The applicant's municipality of residence as of the application date.

fields.name: residenceProvinceCode
fields.label: Sigla prov.
fields.description: Two-letter Italian province code of the municipality of residence (e.g. MI for Milano). Left blank if resident abroad (AIRE), in which case residenceForeignStateCode is used instead.

fields.name: residenceForeignStateCode
fields.label: Sigla stato
fields.description: Foreign-country code for the applicant's residence, used only for applicants registered as resident abroad (AIRE).

fields.name: residenceStreetAddress
fields.label: Via /Piazza
fields.description: Street or square name of the applicant's residence address.

fields.name: residenceHouseNumber
fields.label: N.civico
fields.description: House/street number of the applicant's residence address.

fields.name: maritalStatus
fields.label: Stato civile
fields.description: The applicant's marital status, free text (e.g. celibe/nubile, coniugato/a, divorziato/a, vedovo/a).

fields.name: identityDocumentType
fields.label: Documento di riconoscimento
fields.description: Type of the identity document the applicant is presenting to prove their identity (e.g. carta d'identità, patente).
fields.sourceRef: Modello 308 p.1/3, field 'Campo di testo9'; nota (4)

fields.name: identityDocumentNumber
fields.label: Numero
fields.description: Number of the identity document presented.

fields.name: identityDocumentIssuingAuthority
fields.label: Aut. emittente
fields.description: Authority that issued the identity document presented.

fields.name: identityDocumentIssueDate
fields.label: Data rilascio
fields.description: Issue date of the identity document presented, which must be currently valid per footnote (4).
fields.sourceRef: Modello 308 p.1/3, field 'Campo di testo12'; nota (4)

fields.name: phoneNumber
fields.label: N.telefono
fields.description: The applicant's telephone number.

fields.name: email
fields.label: E-mail
fields.description: The applicant's email address.

fields.name: spouseSurname
fields.label: Cognome coniuge
fields.description: Surname of the applicant's spouse, used only if the applicant later requests it be printed on the passport (see printSpouseSurnameYes/No, footnote 10).

fields.name: heightCm
fields.label: statura in cm
fields.description: The applicant's height in centimetres, printed on the issued passport.

fields.name: eyeColorCode
fields.label: colore occhi
fields.description: Single-letter eye-colour code printed on the issued passport, per footnote (3)'s own legend: A = Azzurri (blue), G = Grigi (grey), M = Marroni (brown), N = Neri (black), V = Verdi (green).
fields.sourceRef: Modello 308 p.1/3, field 'colore occhi'; p.3/3 nota (3) 'Codice scala cromatica occhi'

fields.name: sexMale
fields.label: M (sesso)
fields.description: Applicant's sex is male. One of two mutually exclusive printed checkbox options; see exclusivityGroups. Modelled as an independent boolean, not an enum, since the source AcroForm implements the two boxes as genuinely independent checkbox widgets rather than one radio-button group (per this registry's si/ajpes precedent, GOV-2910).
fields.sourceRef: Modello 308 p.1/3, field 'Casella di controllo0', 'sesso M'

fields.name: sexFemale
fields.label: F (sesso)
fields.description: Applicant's sex is female. One of two mutually exclusive printed checkbox options; see exclusivityGroups.
fields.sourceRef: Modello 308 p.1/3, field 'Casella di controllo1', 'sesso F'

fields.name: obstructiveConditionsYes
fields.label: ricorrono condizioni ostative al rilascio del passaporto — SI
fields.description: The applicant declares that conditions obstructing passport issuance under Legge 21/11/1967 n. 1185 art. 3/3-bis DO apply (e.g. a pending criminal conviction, security/prevention measure, civil decision, or administrative measure entered in the casellario giudiziale, or an inhibition order under art. 3-bis). One of two mutually exclusive printed checkbox options; see exclusivityGroups.
fields.sourceRef: Modello 308 p.1/3, field 'Casella di controllo2'; p.3/3 nota (5)

fields.name: obstructiveConditionsNo
fields.label: ricorrono condizioni ostative al rilascio del passaporto — NO
fields.description: The applicant declares that no conditions obstructing passport issuance apply. One of two mutually exclusive printed checkbox options; see exclusivityGroups.
fields.sourceRef: Modello 308 p.1/3, field 'Casella di controllo3'; p.3/3 nota (5)

fields.name: otherPassportNumber
fields.label: Altro passaporto di cui è già in possesso — Numero
fields.description: Number of another passport (ordinary or diplomatic/service) the applicant already holds, if any, per footnote (6) — the old passport must be presented in person, or a copy of the loss/theft report if it was lost or stolen.
fields.sourceRef: Modello 308 p.1/3, field 'Campo di testo37'; nota (6)

fields.name: otherPassportIssuingAuthority
fields.label: Altro passaporto di cui è già in possesso — Aut. emittente
fields.description: Issuing authority of the other passport already held, if any.
fields.sourceRef: Modello 308 p.1/3, field 'Campo di testo38'; nota (6)

fields.name: otherPassportIssueDate
fields.label: Altro passaporto di cui è già in possesso — Data rilascio
fields.description: Issue date of the other passport already held, if any.
fields.sourceRef: Modello 308 p.1/3, field 'Campo di testo39'; nota (6)

fields.name: domicileMunicipality
fields.label: Comune di domicilio diverso dalla residenza
fields.description: Municipality of the applicant's domicile, only when different from the residence municipality already declared.

fields.name: domicileStreetAddress
fields.label: Via /Piazza (domicilio)
fields.description: Street or square name of the applicant's domicile address, only when different from the residence.

fields.name: domicileHouseNumber
fields.label: N.civico (domicilio)
fields.description: House/street number of the applicant's domicile address, only when different from the residence.

fields.name: hasMinorChildrenYes
fields.label: Figli minori? — SI
fields.description: The applicant declares having minor children, per footnote (7) ('Il richiedente è tenuto a dichiarare se ha figli minori'). One of two mutually exclusive printed checkbox options; see exclusivityGroups.
fields.sourceRef: Modello 308 p.1/3, field 'Casella di controllo4'; nota (7)

fields.name: hasMinorChildrenNo
fields.label: Figli minori? — NO
fields.description: The applicant declares having no minor children. One of two mutually exclusive printed checkbox options; see exclusivityGroups.
fields.sourceRef: Modello 308 p.1/3, field 'Casella di controllo5'; nota (7)

fields.name: soleParentalResponsibilityYes
fields.label: Unico esercente responsabilità genitoriale — SI
fields.description: The applicant declares being the sole holder of parental responsibility over their minor children (no other parent's identity needs to be declared below). One of two mutually exclusive printed checkbox options; see exclusivityGroups.

fields.name: soleParentalResponsibilityNo
fields.label: Unico esercente responsabilità genitoriale — NO
fields.description: The applicant declares NOT being the sole holder of parental responsibility — at least one other parent shares it, to be declared in the 'Altro genitore' block below. One of two mutually exclusive printed checkbox options; see exclusivityGroups.

fields.name: otherParent1FullName
fields.label: Altro genitore 1) — Cognome e nome
fields.description: Full name of the first other parent holding parental responsibility over the applicant's minor children, declared when the applicant is not the sole holder. The form's own numbered rows ('Altro genitore: 1) 2) 3)') bound this to at most three other parents; flattened here to otherParent1..3, matching this registry's established bounded-repeating-group convention (e.g. ng/nis's child1..childN passport fields). Correcting this issue's own pre-scouting note: this block records up to three OTHER PARENTS, not up to three children — the form never asks for the children's own identities, only whether any exist (hasMinorChildrenYes/No).

fields.name: otherParent1DateOfBirth
fields.label: Altro genitore 1) — Data di nascita
fields.description: Date of birth of the first other parent holding parental responsibility.

fields.name: otherParent1BirthMunicipality
fields.label: Altro genitore 1) — Comune di nascita
fields.description: Municipality of birth of the first other parent holding parental responsibility.

fields.name: otherParent1BirthProvinceCode
fields.label: Altro genitore 1) — Sigla prov.
fields.description: Two-letter Italian province code of the first other parent's municipality of birth.

fields.name: otherParent2FullName
fields.label: Altro genitore 2) — Cognome e nome
fields.description: Full name of a second other parent holding parental responsibility, if applicable. See otherParent1FullName for the bounded-repeating-group rationale.

fields.name: otherParent2DateOfBirth
fields.label: Altro genitore 2) — Data di nascita
fields.description: Date of birth of the second other parent, if applicable.

fields.name: otherParent2BirthMunicipality
fields.label: Altro genitore 2) — Comune di nascita
fields.description: Municipality of birth of the second other parent, if applicable.

fields.name: otherParent2BirthProvinceCode
fields.label: Altro genitore 2) — Sigla prov.
fields.description: Two-letter Italian province code of the second other parent's municipality of birth, if applicable.

fields.name: otherParent3FullName
fields.label: Altro genitore 3) — Cognome e nome
fields.description: Full name of a third other parent holding parental responsibility, if applicable. See otherParent1FullName for the bounded-repeating-group rationale.

fields.name: otherParent3DateOfBirth
fields.label: Altro genitore 3) — Data di nascita
fields.description: Date of birth of the third other parent, if applicable.

fields.name: otherParent3BirthMunicipality
fields.label: Altro genitore 3) — Comune di nascita
fields.description: Municipality of birth of the third other parent, if applicable.

fields.name: otherParent3BirthProvinceCode
fields.label: Altro genitore 3) — Sigla prov.
fields.description: Two-letter Italian province code of the third other parent's municipality of birth, if applicable.

fields.name: requestIssuance
fields.label: Chiede: Rilascio passaporto
fields.description: The applicant requests issuance of a new passport. One of four printed checkbox options under 'Chiede: (8)' ('Barrare il riquadro che interessa' — tick the box that applies); see exclusivityGroups. Modelled as an independent boolean, not an enum, matching this registry's si/ajpes precedent for genuinely independent (non-radio) checkbox widgets representing a single-select choice.
fields.sourceRef: Modello 308 p.1/3, field 'Casella di controllo8'; nota (8)

fields.name: requestBilingualStamp
fields.label: Chiede: Applicazione timbro bilingue
fields.description: The applicant requests application of a bilingual stamp to an already-held passport, per footnote (9) — the passport to be stamped must be attached, and only specific Questure listed in footnote (9) (Ancona, Aosta, Bari, Bologna, Cagliari, Campobasso, Catanzaro, Firenze, Genova, L'Aquila, Milano, Napoli, Palermo, Perugia, Pesaro Urbino, Potenza, Roma, Torino, Trieste, Trento, Venezia, Verona) offer this service. One of four printed checkbox options under 'Chiede: (8)'; see exclusivityGroups.
fields.sourceRef: Modello 308 p.1/3, field 'Casella di controllo9'; nota (9)

fields.name: requestDoublePassport
fields.label: Chiede: Doppio passaporto
fields.description: The applicant requests a second, simultaneous passport (doppio passaporto). One of four printed checkbox options under 'Chiede: (8)'; see exclusivityGroups.
fields.sourceRef: Modello 308 p.1/3, field 'Casella di controllo10'; nota (8)

fields.name: requestResidenceChange
fields.label: Chiede: Cambio residenza
fields.description: The applicant requests an update to reflect a change of residence. One of four printed checkbox options under 'Chiede: (8)'; see exclusivityGroups.
fields.sourceRef: Modello 308 p.1/3, field 'Casella di controllo11'; nota (8)

fields.name: printSpouseSurnameYes
fields.label: Stampa cognome coniuge — SI
fields.description: The applicant requests that the spouse's surname (spouseSurname) be printed on the passport, per footnote (10) ('Barrare nel caso si intenda far stampare il cognome del coniuge sul passaporto'). One of two mutually exclusive printed checkbox options; see exclusivityGroups.
fields.sourceRef: Modello 308 p.1/3, field 'Casella di controllo12'; nota (10)

fields.name: printSpouseSurnameNo
fields.label: Stampa cognome coniuge — NO
fields.description: The applicant does not request the spouse's surname be printed on the passport. One of two mutually exclusive printed checkbox options; see exclusivityGroups.
fields.sourceRef: Modello 308 p.1/3, field 'Casella di controllo13'; nota (10)

fields.name: delegateSurname
fields.label: Delega al ritiro — Cognome
fields.description: Surname of the person the applicant delegates to collect the issued passport on their behalf, if any.

fields.name: delegateFirstName
fields.label: Delega al ritiro — Nome
fields.description: First name of the pickup delegate, if any.

fields.name: delegateDateOfBirth
fields.label: Delega al ritiro — Data di nascita
fields.description: Date of birth of the pickup delegate, if any.

fields.name: delegateFiscalCode
fields.label: Codice fiscale (delega al ritiro)
fields.description: Italian codice fiscale (16-character alphanumeric tax code) of the pickup delegate, if any. A comb-formatted 16-box field on the source.

fields.name: dataProtectionConsent
fields.label: Accettazione al trattamento dei dati personali
fields.description: The applicant declares having read and received a copy of the privacy notice for electronic ordinary passport applicants under Article 13 of Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) of 27 April 2016, and consents to the processing of their personal data accordingly. Page 2 of 3 carries this declaration as flat scanned/rendered image content with zero AcroForm widgets of its own (disclosed judgment call — see VERIFICATION.md); still modelled here since it is an applicant consent, not office-reserved content.
fields.sourceRef: Modello 308 p.2/3, 'Accettazione al trattamento dei dati personali'

documents.label: Fotocopia di un documento di riconoscimento del richiedente in corso di validità
documents.handling: A photocopy of the applicant's valid identity document, presented together with the original, per page 3/3 list item a).

documents.label: Due fotografie recenti, identiche, frontali, a volto scoperto e a sfondo bianco
documents.handling: Two recent, identical, frontal, bare-headed, white-background photographs conforming to ICAO characteristics (Decisione C(2005) 409 point 7), per footnote (2) and page 3/3 list item b).
documents.sourceRef: Modello 308 p.3/3, nota (2); list item b)

documents.label: Attestazione di versamento di € 42,50 (bollettino postale c/c 67422808)
documents.handling: Proof of payment of €42.50, exclusively via postal current-account bollettino no. 67422808, made out to the Ministero dell'Economia e delle Finanze — Dipartimento del Tesoro, cause 'importo per il rilascio del passaporto elettronico', per page 3/3 list item c).

documents.label: Contributo amministrativo di € 73,50 in contrassegno telematico
documents.handling: A €73.50 administrative-contribution telematic stamp (contrassegno telematico), purchasable from tobacconists/valori-bollati retailers — not necessary for a temporary passport (an office-side determination outside this form's applicant-facing scope), per page 3/3 list item d).

documents.label: Eventuale precedente passaporto, o copia della denuncia di smarrimento/furto
documents.handling: The applicant's previous passport, if any is already held (see otherPassportNumber); if it was lost or stolen, a copy of the loss/theft report instead, per footnote (6) and page 3/3 list item e). Not gated by a requiredWhen condition: the source ties this to whether a prior passport is 'eventuale' (possibly held) rather than to a clean boolean trigger field, and this registry avoids gating requiredWhen on an optional text field's emptiness (a known false-negative risk when the field is simply absent rather than an explicit empty string) — left as an always-optional, disclosed judgment call.
documents.sourceRef: Modello 308 p.3/3, nota (6); list item e)
